title: iria hanceana
intro: Iria hanceana, also known as the Iria plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Iria hanceana include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and fighting infections. The herbal preparations of Iria hanceana typically involve making teas, infusions, or extracts from the plant's leaves and flowers.
